tool_summary: A command-line utility used to compare two files line by line and display the differences between them.
platform_notes: GNU diff adds --color, -z (null-delimited input), and --line-format which are not available on BSD diff. No behavioral differences exist for the flags covered in this ruleset. A linux-specific ruleset should be generated if those flags require risk rules.

rules.description: Recursive directory traversal to compare multiple files/folders, enabling broader file and directory discovery for reconnaissance.
